aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO readiness but lacks critical optimizations in content, reviews, and local SEO.
quick_wins: Implement a clear and keyword-rich website title.
Actively solicit and display customer reviews on Google and the website.
Optimize meta descriptions and headers with relevant keywords.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a physical address listed but lacks a consistent Google Business Profile (GBP).
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP significantly impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: Inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) across the website and potential citations.

nap_citations.summary: The business has a physical address but lacks consistent NAP citations across directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a GBP listing with consistent NAP information.
Audit and update NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Ensure NAP consistency on the website and in schema markup.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Charlotte, NC, and surrounding areas.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Claim and optimize GBP listing and encourage customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish high-quality, localized content about HVAC services and energy efficiency to build domain authority.

business_name: Alpha One Heating & Air Conditioning, LLC
